# Soma Language — for AI agents and LLMs

> Soma is a programming language for verified distributed systems.
> Same code runs on 1 machine or a cluster. The compiler proves it correct.

## What is Soma

A language where every system is a **cell** with:
- **memory** — state with properties: [persistent, consistent] → SQLite, [ephemeral, local] → in-memory
- **state machines** — lifecycle with formal verification (CTL temporal logic)
- **handlers** (on) — functions that process signals
- **scale** — distribution: replicas, shard, consistency (strong/causal/eventual), tolerance
- **face** — compile-time checked contracts

## Key capabilities

- `soma check app.cell --json` → verify contracts, returns JSON errors
- `soma verify app.cell --json` → prove state machine properties, returns counter-examples
- `soma describe app.cell` → structured JSON: signals, memory, state machines, scale
- `soma serve app.cell` → HTTP server on :8080
- `soma serve app.cell --join host:port` → join a cluster (same code, no changes)
- `soma deploy app.cell --target cloudflare|fly|aws` → deploy to cloud

## For agents building Soma code

Read AGENT.md at https://github.com/soma-dev-lang/soma/blob/main/AGENT.md
Read SOMA_REFERENCE.md at https://github.com/soma-dev-lang/soma/blob/main/SOMA_REFERENCE.md
